Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MANATT PHELPS & PHILLIPS, LLP Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Appearances: Maurice Wainer, of Snipper, Wainer & Markoff, (310) 550-5770, appearing for Respondent Havasu Lakeshore Investments, LLC and opposing party (appearing thru Court Call); Joel D. Adler, Esq, of the Adler Law Firm, (415) 433-5333, appearing for Petitioner and moving party. Hearing held and argued. Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Counsel to submit Proposed Orders to the Court. (302/PHA/X-LT) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
